what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in a channel-memory ledger, linking a design-assets channel entry to an image resource URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: target URI uses an image:// scheme and contains spaces/parentheses
timestamp has microsecond precision and explicit UTC offset
concerns: target path contains literal spaces and parentheses, which may need encoding
no checksum, size, or MIME type
no author or message_id to anchor the attachment
notes: A minimal ledger entry that records an image attachment for the design-assets channel and points it to a local image URI.
questions: Which message or post is this attachment attached to?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's path and content both indicate it is a channel attachment metadata record, and the content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: To capture when and where an image asset was attached in a design channel so it can be indexed and retrieved later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, supporting attachment indexing and retrieval without ranking it against other records.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file recording an image attachment (att-45258908) in the design-assets channel, pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (44) and noting its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: To log an image attachment and its target URI for the design-assets channel.
